steps.title: Distribute to both terms
steps.content:
Multiply $14$ by each term inside the parentheses. The factor outside the parentheses applies to both $x$ and $12$:
$$
14(x+12)=14x+14(12)
$$

steps.title: Simplify the constant
steps.content: Calculate the constant term: $$ 14(12)=168 $$ So the equivalent expression keeps the original variable term and uses that product: $$ 14x+168 $$ The answer is B.
